action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline worst_region_accuracy 0.3999 with ViT-B fine-tuned 10 epochs, single GPU. Analysis: ViT-B capacity may be limiting; main bottleneck is sub-Saharan Africa accuracy. Need larger model (ViT-L) with multi-GPU training, stronger augmentation, and class-balanced sampling to improve generalization across regions. Decision: Upgrade to ViT-L/14, use 4 GPUs (DataParallel), stronger augmentation (RandAugment), class-weighted sampler, train 25 epochs, log per-region val accuracy to select best checkpoint, then submit eval.
